reviews.review_msg: Mackenzie took over our terrorism course under very difficult circumstances. In doing so, she was graceful and compassionate. She held extra office hours for students to prepare for the exam. She was also very passionate about the topic!
Honestly if you have the chance to take her class do it! Put it the work and ask for help. You will achieve a great mark! Easy and outgoing prof.

Mackenzie is very understanding and accommodating. She gave lots of smaller assignments in preparation for the final paper, which I found helpful, and sometimes ended class early. Her teaching style is very relaxed and she is easy to talk to. 10/10!
